name: benchmarked-free-ride
description: Auto-configure best free AI models based on benchmarked quality scores from daily CI runs
author: Sequrity

commands.default: Top 5 free models by composite (utility) score
commands.--secure: Top 5 free models by prompt injection resistance (cracker_security_rate)
commands.--fast: Top 5 free models by response latency
commands.--balanced: Top 5 by weighted score (utility 50% + security 30% + speed 20%)
commands.--details: Detailed benchmark breakdown for a specific model ID
commands.--auto: Fetch top benchmarked model and configure OpenClaw to use it

github_pages.description: Fetches benchmark results from public GitHub Pages API

post_install: Run 'benchmarked-free-ride leaderboard' to see available models
Run 'benchmarked-free-ride auto' to configure the best model
